posts.text:
Australia is out. Japan is out. So far, no one seems to be in...


AFP News Agency (@AFP)

BREAKING Japan says it is "not considering" maritime security operations after US President Donald Trump called for other countries to send warships to help protect the Strait of Hormuz





— https://nitter.net/AFP/status/2033364942250725858#m
Trump warns NATO that it will face a very bad future if it refuses to help the US win a war that Trump says the US already won two weeks ago...

It appears very unlikely that Tehran would take a call from Macron only to hear him complain to Iran about how it is responding to a war that the US and Israel started, while making further demands for Iranian concessions.

It appears that Macron left out from his tweet all the actually important points he likely made in that call...


Emmanuel Macron (@EmmanuelMacron)

I have just spoken with Iranian President Massoud Pezeshkian.

I called on him to put an immediate end to the unacceptable atta
